    "About": [
      "It is about dogmatism, a lack of internal consistency, criticism related to materialism, arguments that Marxism is a type of historical determinism or that it necessitates a suppression of individual rights, issues with the implementation of communism and economic issues such as the distortion or absence of price signals and reduced incentives.",
      "It is about empirical and epistemological concerns, arguing that Marxism relies on vague or unfalsifiable theories, resists refutation through dialectical reinterpretation, and has failed key predictions about capitalist collapse and socialist revolution."

  "japanese": {
    "About": [
      "それは、権威主義、内部の一貫性の欠如、唯物論（哲学的および歴史的）に関連する批判、マルクス主義が歴史決定論の一種であるという議論、またはそれが個人の権利の抑圧を必要とするという議論、共産主義の実施に関する問題、および価格シグナルの歪みまたは欠如とインセンティブの低下などの経済的問題に関するものです。",

    ],

About: It is about dogmatism, a lack of internal consistency, criticism related to materialism, arguments that Marxism is a type of historical determinism or that it necessitates a suppression of individual rights, issues with the implementation of communism and economic issues such as the distortion or absence of price signals and reduced incentives.

It is about empirical and epistemological concerns, arguing that Marxism relies on vague or unfalsifiable theories, resists refutation through dialectical reinterpretation, and has failed key predictions about capitalist collapse and socialist revolution.
Affects: It affects the suppression of individual rights.
It affects the implementation of communism.
It affects economic issues such as the distortion or absence of price signals and reduced incentives.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with various political ideologies, campaigns and academic disciplines.
It is associated with general intellectual criticism about dogmatism.
It is associated with a lack of internal consistency.
It is associated with criticism related to materialism.
It is associated with arguments that Marxism is a type of historical determinism.
It is associated with issues with the implementation of communism.
It is associated with economic issues such as the distortion or absence of price signals and reduced incentives.
It is associated with empirical and epistemological concerns.
It is associated with vague or unfalsifiable theories.
It is associated with dialectical reinterpretation.
CausedBy: It is caused by a lack of internal consistency.
It is caused by issues with the implementation of communism.
It is caused by economic issues such as the distortion or absence of price signals and reduced incentives.
It is caused by vague or unfalsifiable theories.
It is caused by dialectical reinterpretation.
It is caused by failed predictions about capitalist collapse and socialist revolution.
ConsistsOf: It consists of general intellectual criticism about dogmatism.
It consists of a lack of internal consistency.
It consists of criticism related to materialism.
It consists of arguments that Marxism is a type of historical determinism.
It consists of arguments that Marxism necessitates a suppression of individual rights.
It consists of issues with the implementation of communism.
It consists of economic issues such as the distortion or absence of price signals and reduced incentives.
It consists of empirical and epistemological concerns.
It consists of arguments that Marxism relies on vague or unfalsifiable theories.
It consists of arguments that Marxism resists refutation through dialectical reinterpretation.
HasA: It has a tendency to accumulate immense masses of half-assimilated materials.
It has a tendency to plan encyclopaedic works which were never completed.
It has a tendency towards a withering contempt for all non-scholars.
It has a tendency towards extreme assertiveness and irascibility in dealing with other scholars.
It has the hallmark of Talmudic study.
It has a commentary on, a critique of the work of others in his field.

About: それは、権威主義、内部の一貫性の欠如、唯物論（哲学的および歴史的）に関連する批判、マルクス主義が歴史決定論の一種であるという議論、またはそれが個人の権利の抑圧を必要とするという議論、共産主義の実施に関する問題、および価格シグナルの歪みまたは欠如とインセンティブの低下などの経済的問題に関するものです。
それは、マルクス主義が曖昧または反証不可能な理論に依存しており、弁証法的再解釈による反証に抵抗し、資本主義の崩壊と社会主義革命に関する重要な予測に失敗したと主張する経験的および認識論的な懸念に関するものです。
Affects: それは個人の権利の抑圧に影響します。
